Metadata.title: NameForMe — AI domain discovery
Metadata.description: AI-powered domain name generator that understands your brand. Find and register the perfect domain.

Home.heroTitle: Find the perfect domain name for your next big idea
Home.heroSubtitle: Stop struggling with taken domains. Our AI understands your brand vision and generates creative, available domain names in seconds.
Home.scenarioSubtitle: Choose a scenario to get started — we'll guide you through the rest
Home.scenarioStartupDesc: Innovative, memorable names for your next venture
Home.scenarioEcommerceDesc: Trustworthy names that convert visitors to buyers
Home.scenarioBlogDesc: Unique names that reflect your personality
Home.scenarioAppDesc: Short, catchy names for digital products
Home.scenarioOtherDesc: Tell us about your project in your own words
Home.scenarioCustomPlaceholder: e.g. A sustainable fashion marketplace for Gen Z...
Home.howSubtitle: Three simple steps to your perfect domain
Home.step1Body: Choose a scenario or describe your project. Our AI asks smart follow-up questions to understand your brand.
Home.step2Body: Multiple naming strategies — blends, metaphors, prefixes — with real-time availability and pricing.
Home.step3Body: Compare scores, prices, and register with your preferred registrar in one click.
Home.featuresSubtitle: More than a random name generator
Home.feature1Body: Multi-turn dialogue that refines results based on your feedback — not just keyword mashups.
Home.feature2Body: Blends, metaphors, prefixes, suffixes, and more. Each batch explores different creative angles.
Home.feature3Body: Every name scored on readability, memorability, brand fit, pronunciation, and association.
Home.feature4Body: Instant domain availability checks across all major TLDs with pricing comparison.
Home.feature5Body: Jump directly to your preferred registrar with the domain pre-filled. No middleman.
Home.feature6Body: Your searches stay in your browser. No accounts required, no data sold.
Home.faq1A: Yes! Generating and checking domain names is completely free. You only pay when you register a domain through a registrar.
Home.faq2Q: How does the AI naming work?
Home.faq2A: Our AI uses multiple naming strategies including linguistic blending, metaphor generation, prefix/suffix combinations, and semantic analysis to create unique, brandable names.
Home.faq3Q: Can I check if a domain is available?
Home.faq3A: Absolutely. Every generated name is automatically checked for availability across popular TLDs, with real-time pricing from major registrars.
Home.faq4A: No, we are not a registrar. We help you discover the perfect name and then link you directly to trusted registrars to complete the purchase.
Home.ctaTitle: Ready to find your perfect domain?
Home.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of builders who found their brand name with NameForMe.

About.title: About NameForMe
About.body: NameForMe is an AI assistant for discovering domain names: conversational requirements, multi-strategy generation, availability checks, quality scores, and registrar links. We are not a registrar — we help you pick and register with partners.

Privacy.title: Privacy policy
Privacy.body: We minimize data collection. Chat and generation requests are processed to provide the service. Search history and favorites are stored locally in your browser unless you clear them. See nameforme.com for updates.

Search.title: Brand requirements questionnaire
Search.sessionMissing: This session no longer exists (it may have been deleted). Start a new search below.
Search.chatColumnHint: Share your ideas — the AI helps you discover more domains that fit.
Search.listEmpty: No domains passed your budget and availability checks yet. Keep chatting to refine.
Search.chatMessageTooLong: Each message can be at most {max} characters. Shorten and try again.
Search.genInterrupted: Generation was interrupted. Please start again. If you just came back to this tab, try again—long requests may be paused in the background.
Search.httpRateLimit: Too many requests. Try again in {sec}s.
Search.httpSiteBusy: The site is busy right now. Try again later.
Search.httpAccessDenied: Verification failed or access denied. Refresh the page and try again.
Search.rateDetail: Personal day left {ipDay} · site hour left {siteHour}
Search.rateBannerSiteHour: Site capacity is full this hour. Please try again next hour.
Search.rateBannerIpDay: Your daily quota is used up. Please come back tomorrow (UTC midnight).
Search.rateBannerBlocked: Your access has been temporarily restricted. Please try again later.
Search.genDoneSummary: Checked **{checked}** domains; **{inPool}** registrable within budget; **{picked}** curated for your list.
Search.noResults: No available domains in this batch — chat to refine and generate again.
Search.generateMissingStrategies: No valid generation strategies were found in the reply. Add a bit more context, or ask me to emit the strategy markers again.
Search.filterPriceMaxHint: Leave empty for no cap; same currency as list
Search.clearListBody: Removes every domain shown here. Saved favorites are not affected.
Search.filterEmpty: No domains match these filters — try adjusting them.

Wizard.descriptionHint: Share any ideas, design directions, or open questions about the project.
Wizard.marketHint: Steers check path and TLD bias: China/.cn vs global gTLDs.
Wizard.suffixesHint: Ordered roughly by popularity; select multiple.
Wizard.emptyDescriptionFallback: (No detailed description yet — please add more context for better domain suggestions.)
Wizard.budgetHint: First-year registrar price (incl. premium) compared in USD.
